info.title: EPR.Cli.Console
info.description: A simple global tool to orchestrate releasing.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(Boolean), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String, Boolean), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String, Boolean))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A set of helper commands for Chameleon EPR.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Creates a release branch with a given version from develop.

options.name: --version
options.description: The version number for the release branch. E.g. 2020.1.25-1

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Disables the printing of most logs.

commands.name: finish
commands.description: Finishes the release by tagging the commit with the given version and merging to master.

options.name: --cleanup
options.description: Remove release branches locally and remotely after completion.

options.name: --version
options.description: The version number for the release branch. E.g. 2020.1.25-1

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Disables the printing of most logs.
